message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting to agent, extensions, and session modules

Whitespace and line-wrapping normalization from automated formatting:
- Remove trailing whitespace in agent.rs abort handling and session.rs v2 sidecar check
- Reflow multi-line expressions in extensions.rs UTF-8 chunk processing for
  consistent indentation
- Adjust line breaks in extensions_js.rs module cache and monorepo stub generation
- No behavioral changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
